# Chapter 8: Analog electronics  (~140 pp)
- 8.1 Op-amps as building blocks (18) · 8.2 Filters: passive and active (18) · 8.3 Amplifiers: small-signal, power, RF (20) · 8.4 Oscillators (12) · 8.5 Power conversion: linear, switching (18) · 8.6 Noise: sources, characterisation, mitigation (15) · 8.7 PCB design for analog (18) · 8.8 Failure section: ground loops, oscillation in unwanted feedback paths, layout-induced noise (21)

**Archetype**: control, interface, failure. **Project**: design and build a low-noise instrumentation amplifier. **Exercises**: 35.
